title: Respiratory Syncytial Virus (RSV) Vaccination Coverage, Pregnant Women, United States | RSVVaxView | CDC
text:
vaccination coverage among women enrolled in the VSD sites. For example, in an analysis conducted after the 2023–24 season in August 2024 that allowed for more time to capture vaccine administrations in electronic health records and was restricted to women with continuous enrollment at a VSD site from September 22, 2023–January 31, 2024, coverage increased from 17.8% to 30.5%. 
Apr. 9, 2025
